title: GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS and ENERGY AND ENVIRONMENT COMMITTEES REPORT relative to ensuring the municipal electrification, solar and battery decarbonization master plan has a focus on large City parcels to maximize Greenhouse Gas (GHG) elimination.

appearances.section: Items for which Public Hearings Have Been Held
appearances.recommendation: DIRECT the Bureau of Engineering (BOE) and REQUEST the Department of Water and Power (DWP) to ensure the municipal electrification, solar and battery decarbonization master plan has a focus on large City parcels, properties and other opportunities that lower municipal solar bills, and generate the most renewable energy and storage opportunities to maximize GHG elimination. DIRECT the BOE and the Los Angeles Police Department (LAPD), and REQUEST the DWP, to report to Council on the feasibility of adding solar and energy storage assets to LAPD properties and parking lots, including the prioritization of the Canoga Park Police Station and parking lot. Fiscal Impact Statement: Neither the City Administrative Officer nor the Chief Legislative Analyst has completed a financial analysis of this report. Community Impact Statement: None submitted Joint Government Operations and Energy and Environment Committee Report 10-21-25 Transmittal Letter 10-21-25 Motion (Blumenfield - Nazarian) dated 10-07-25

attachments.text: Joint Government Operations and Energy and Environment Committee Report 10-21-25
